title.rendered: How AI Writing Can Make You More Productive & Creative

content.rendered:
In this episode of “In The Now”, guest Gregory Kennedy, a fractional CMO of Brand Zen says that only 37% of marketers are leveraging AI Tools like ChatGPT to be more effective. He is joined by host, David Reske, who is also The CEO of Nowspeed.

While many people believe that AI is simply a marketing productivity tool that helps us write faster, it does not actually do it that well. Gregory Kennedy, who is a Fractional CMO, believes that marketers should be using AI to create and write better ideas. AI-enabled writing can make you more productive, while AI-enabled ideas can keep you creatively fulfilled. Listen now to find out how AI can bring out your own superpower!
